simple.name: SIMPLE
simple.description: Timer visible. Sound optional. Training wheels attached.

raw.name: RAW
raw.description: No timer. No sound. Just you and the silence.

spicy.name: SPICY
spicy.description: You set the range. The app decides when you're done.

pickup: The phone calls to you and you answer like a dog.
I expected nothing and you still disappointed me.
Five seconds. That is all it took.
You were doing so well. Now you are not.
complete: You have done the bare minimum. Good.
Even a broken clock is right twice a day.
streakBroken: The streak is dead. Begin again.
streakMilestone: Consistency noted. Do not make it a personality.
The streak grows. So do my expectations.

pickup: The mind wanders. That's normal. Return.
Phones are designed to distract. You're fighting that. Come back.
One interruption doesn't ruin the session.
complete: Every session counts. This one counted.
You did the hard thing. That's everything.
Look at you. Still here, still trying.
The fact you finished means something.
That was real practice. Be proud.
streakBroken: Rest is part of the practice. Begin again.
Streaks end. New ones begin. Today.
It's okay. You know the way back.
streakMilestone: Consistency is the whole game. You're playing it.
This streak is real. You built it.
Day by day. That's how it works.
